scripts.dev:all: supabase start 2>&1 && echo '\n✅ Supabase is running!\n' && concurrently --kill-others --names supabase,web,mobile --prefix-colors cyan,green,magenta 'supabase functions serve --env-file supabase/.env' 'bun --env-file=.env.local --cwd=apps/web run dev' 'cd apps/mobile && npx expo prebuild --clean && npx expo run:android'
scripts.dev:web: supabase start 2>&1 && echo '\n✅ Supabase is running!\n' && concurrently --kill-others --names supabase,web --prefix-colors cyan,green 'supabase functions serve --env-file supabase/.env' 'bun --env-file=.env.local --cwd=apps/web run dev'
scripts.dev:mobile:android: cd apps/mobile && npx expo prebuild --clean && npx expo run:android
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd=apps/web run typecheck && bun --cwd=apps/mobile run typecheck
scripts.test: bun --cwd=apps/web run test && bun --cwd=packages/shared run test
scripts.fix-all: bun run format:fix && bun run lint:fix && bun run typecheck
